aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Action-oriented but slightly restless

💼 Career: Jaldi decision lene ka pressure hoga, par clarity zaruri hai

❤️ Love: Misunderstanding avoid karne ke liye patience rakho

💰 Money: Risk lene se pehle soch lo

🧘 Advice: React nahi, respond karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Control se zyada awareness powerful hai
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Calm aur stable

💼 Career: Consistency tumhe aage le jayegi

❤️ Love: Emotional security strong hogi

💰 Money: Financial comfort feel hoga

🧘 Advice: Stubborn mat bano

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Jo change accept karta hai, wahi grow karta hai
gemini:
♊ Gemini

🔥 Energy: Fast aur curious

💼 Career: Ek naya connection benefit de sakta hai

❤️ Love: Light mood bonding improve karega

💰 Money: Small gain ka signal

🧘 Advice: Focus lose mat karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Direction ke bina speed bekaar hai
cancer:
♋ Cancer
